title: Press Communiqué
text:
Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Law and Justice

Press Communiqué

Posted On:
17 APR 2026 7:08PM by PIB Delhi

In exercise of the power conferred by the Constitution of India, the President of India, after consultation with Chief Justice of India, is pleased to appoint the following Additional Judges as Permanent Judges in the Chhattisgarh High Court:

S. No.

Name of the Additional Judge

(S/Shri Justice)

Details



Sachin Singh Rajput

Appointed as Permanent Judges of the Chhattisgarh High Court



Radhakishan Agrawal



Sanjay Kumar Jaiswal



Bibhu Datta Guru



Amitendra Kishore Prasad

****

Samrat/pranab

(Release ID: 2253094)

Visitor Counter : 15
